history.content:
<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column G. Ahead (row 02 column C) is lava `L`, so I must avoid moving forward. Since turning right would face down toward row 03 column B which is `.` (safe), I will turn right first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 03 column B) is `.` safe. I should move forward toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

</thought>
<action>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
